message:
feat: add --threshold-scale to serfeval for evaluation testing

Adds CompactionThresholdScale to SessionConfig, applied in both
NewSession and RestoreSession. The serfeval CLI exposes it as
--threshold-scale. This enables short eval tasks to trigger compaction
by lowering thresholds (e.g., 0.1 = 10% of defaults).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
